title: Gate Decision
description: Schema for a gate card recording a decision at a specific station in an editorial flow cycle.

gateId.description: Unique identifier for this gate card, e.g. GATE-CYCLE-001-S5.

cycleId.description: Reference to the parent cycle report.

evaluatedBy.description: Name or role of the evaluator. If AI-assisted, note 'AI assistant — subject to human review'.

gateCondition.description: The specific condition this gate evaluates.

evidenceEvaluated.description: Description of what was assessed to make this decision.

rationale.description: Explanation of the basis for the decision.

nextAction.description: Description of what should happen next as a result of this gate decision.

override.description: Override record, if the original decision was overridden.

overridingParty.description: Name or role of the party who overrode the decision.

statusOutcome.description: One of the eight valid cycle outcomes.
